## Summary

Describe the feature clearly.

## Problem

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

What should be added or changed?

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you considered.

## Scope

Please confirm whether this request is about:

- [ ] Public frontend
- [ ] Admin dashboard
- [ ] Public API
- [ ] AI / RAG runtime behavior
- [ ] Documentation

## Notes

Requests for the private Everytime crawler or private production data pipeline are out of scope for this OSS repository.
